name: Dogecoin Cash, Inc.
summary: Dogecoin Cash, Inc. (formerly Cannabis Sativa, Inc.) is a Nevada-incorporated company that operates primarily through its majority-owned subsidiary PrestoCorp, Inc. (doing business as PrestoDoctor), a telemedicine platform connecting patients with licensed physicians for medical cannabis evaluations via secure video consultations. The company also maintains cannabis-related intellectual property through Kubby Patent and Licenses, LLC and conducts exploratory digital asset activities through subsidiaries including Dogecoin Treasury, Inc., DogeSPAC LLC, and Meme Coins, Inc.

products.name: PrestoDoctor
products.description: Telemedicine platform connecting patients with licensed physicians for medical cannabis evaluations via secure video consultations where permitted by state law.

products.name: Ecuadorian Sativa cannabis strain plant patent (CTA)
products.description: Cannabis strain plant patent held through Kubby Patent and Licenses, LLC.

products.name: Cannabinoid lozenge hypertension method patent
products.description: Patent for a method of treating hypertension using a cannabinoid-containing lozenge delivery system, held through Kubby Patent and Licenses, LLC.
